app.name: n8n
app.bestFor: The top pick when you want AI baked in, not bolted on — native agent nodes, RAG and tool-calling, self-hostable for full data control.

app.name: Zapier
app.bestFor: Fast, event-driven SaaS automations for non-technical teams, with an 8,000+ app connector catalog and minimal setup.

app.name: Make
app.bestFor: High-volume, multi-branch workflows where visual debugging and deterministic routing matter most.

app.name: Gumloop
app.bestFor: A no-code AI-first builder bundling visual flows, model connectors, hosted MCP and a build-assistant agent ("Gummie") in one place.

app.name: Microsoft Power Automate
app.bestFor: Enterprise workflow and RPA automation deeply wired into Microsoft 365 and the Power Platform.

app.name: Activepieces
app.bestFor: Open-source Zapier alternative where each of ~750 integrations is also exposed as an MCP server for agents.

app.name: Workato
app.bestFor: Enterprise iPaaS for governed, cross-department integration and automation at scale.

skill.name: n8n
skill.bestFor: The dominant open-source workflow-automation platform (~197.8k★) — 400+ integrations, native AI/agent nodes, fully self-hostable. The de-facto leader.

skill.name: Activepieces
skill.bestFor: The leading MIT-licensed Zapier alternative (~23.4k★) — self-hostable with a TypeScript pieces framework and AI-agent/MCP support.

skill.name: Node-RED
skill.bestFor: Mature low-code, event-driven flow tool (~23.4k★, IBM origin) — the standard for wiring together devices, APIs and services, huge in IoT.

skill.name: Windmill
skill.bestFor: Fast Rust-based developer platform (~17.3k★) that turns scripts into workflows, UIs and cron jobs — for engineers who want code over drag-and-drop.

skill.name: Trigger.dev
skill.bestFor: Code-first background jobs and AI-agent workflows (~15.7k★) in TypeScript — durable, long-running tasks for developers.

skill.name: n8n-skills (Członkowski)
skill.bestFor: The de-facto Claude Code skill pack for workflow automation (~5.9k★) — 14 skills for building production n8n workflows, by the author of n8n-mcp.

skill.name: Kestra
skill.bestFor: Event-driven, YAML-declarative orchestration and scheduling platform (~27.4k★) — broader/data-oriented, bridging workflow automation and pipeline orchestration.

skill.name: n8n Skills (official, n8n-io)
skill.bestFor: The official n8n skill repo (~363★) — authoritative, first-party guidance for building n8n workflows in Claude Code; newer and smaller than Członkowski's pack.

skill.name: n8n-skills (haunchen)
skill.bestFor: Independent n8n skill suite (~377★) documenting nodes and curated templates for Claude Code, Desktop and Web.

notes: Skill/Repo track rebuilt to rank by real adoption, not form factor. The recognized OSS workflow-automation platforms lead as kind:repo — n8n (~197.8k★) is the runaway leader, followed by Activepieces, Node-RED, Windmill and Trigger.dev — with the genuine Claude skills ranked among them: Członkowski's n8n-skills (~5.9k★) is the de-facto skill pack, plus the official n8n-io/skills and haunchen alternatives. The dedicated skill ecosystem here is almost entirely n8n-focused; Kestra is included as a broader (data-adjacent) orchestration option. Removed all MCP entries (Zapier MCP, n8n MCP, Activepieces MCP, Composio; note czlonkowski/n8n-mcp ~22k★ is an MCP server, excluded). Huginn (~49.7k★) and Automatisch were left out as stalled/slow-maintenance. Star counts verified live 2026-07-24.
